series_metadata.series_description: These files contain information on credit unions that are chartered with the State of Ohio who voluntarily liquidate their assets.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for six (6) years from dissolution, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for six (6) years from dissolution, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
